evidence: Gecko is on the enclosure wall with visible loose/flap-like pale skin around the head/neck and body, repeatedly shifting posture and pressing/climbing against the wall. Later frames show the same loose skin more clearly while the body remains extended against the wall.
uncertainty_notes: Movement/climbing is also present, but the visible loose skin and wall-rubbing posture make shedding the stronger label. No evidence of prey, paste, water contact, defecation, hiding, or basking.
